initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this python missing_dependency fails: Package directory missing __init__.py or not on path — extend PYTHONPATH to include common source roots. Reproduce the failure with `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -t tests`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -t tests
